creator: freebsd@jonathanprice.org
text:
Created attachment 159362
Patch file

Update games/minecraft-server from 1.8.7 to 1.8.8.

This release fixes a potential server crashing exploit. Further information can be found at https://mojang.com/2015/07/minecraft-1-8-8-release/.

portlint -A output and poudriere testport output files have been attached, in addition to the patch itself.

The patch has been tested on both a new and an existing installation, with no immediate issues discovered.
